desc.pt: Painel de visualização moderno para ioBroker
desc.fr: Tableau de bord de visualisation moderne pour ioBroker
desc.it: Dashboard di visualizzazione moderna per ioBroker
desc.es: Panel de visualización moderno para ioBroker
desc.zh-cn: ioBroker 的现代可视化仪表板

0.9.90.en: feat(universal-widget): hide dropdown option for select cell
0.9.90.de: feat(universal-widget): hide dropdown option for select cell

0.9.89.en: fix(layout-drawer): disable both placement buttons when header is on; fix(layout-drawer): disable 'in tab bar' when header on or auto-hide on; feat(layout-drawer): customize title and entry display style; feat(layouts): drag to reorder layouts in admin list; feat(layout-drawer): add 'in tab bar' placement option; fix(layout-drawer): allow inline trigger width to fit icon + name
0.9.89.de: fix(layout-drawer): disable both placement buttons when header is on; fix(layout-drawer): disable 'in tab bar' when header on or auto-hide on; feat(layout-drawer): customize title and entry display style; feat(layouts): drag to reorder layouts in admin list; feat(layout-drawer): add 'in tab bar' placement option; fix(layout-drawer): allow inline trigger width to fit icon + name

0.9.88.en: fix(knob): use knob default grid as editor fallback; feat(knob): empty default custom grid except dial at 2/2; fix(knob): honour titleAlign in bogen/skala/endless layouts; feat(custom-grid): allow fontSize as explicit pixel size on component cells; feat(knob): add custom layout with selectable dial style
0.9.88.de: fix(knob): use knob default grid as editor fallback; feat(knob): empty default custom grid except dial at 2/2; fix(knob): honour titleAlign in bogen/skala/endless layouts; feat(custom-grid): allow fontSize as explicit pixel size on component cells; feat(knob): add custom layout with selectable dial style

0.9.87.en: fix(knob): auto-compute label decimals to avoid duplicate scale labels
0.9.87.de: fix(knob): auto-compute label decimals to avoid duplicate scale labels

0.9.86.en: fix(editor): sort widget types alphabetically within each category
0.9.86.de: fix(editor): sort widget types alphabetically within each category

0.9.85.en: feat(knob): add knob widget with 3 layouts (Bogen / Skala / Endlos 3D)
0.9.85.de: feat(knob): add knob widget with 3 layouts (Bogen / Skala / Endlos 3D)

0.9.84.en: fix(editor): keep widget type when changing DP; ask before auto-switch on new widgets
0.9.84.de: fix(editor): keep widget type when changing DP; ask before auto-switch on new widgets

0.9.83.en: feat(weather): pre-populate custom grid from standard layout settings
0.9.83.de: feat(weather): pre-populate custom grid from standard layout settings

0.9.82.en: fix(conditions): hidden+reflow widgets inside groups now hide and slide up
0.9.82.de: fix(conditions): hidden+reflow widgets inside groups now hide and slide up

0.9.81.en: fix(icons): allow null fallback in getWidgetIcon; fix(icons): broken Iconify IDs fall back to widget default; picker filters them; fix(jsontable): autoHeight effect no longer clobbers option toggles
0.9.81.de: fix(icons): allow null fallback in getWidgetIcon; fix(icons): broken Iconify IDs fall back to widget default; picker filters them; fix(jsontable): autoHeight effect no longer clobbers option toggles

0.9.80.en: fix(conditions): hidden+reflow widgets reappear on live DP change
0.9.80.de: fix(conditions): hidden+reflow widgets reappear on live DP change

0.9.79.en: fix(light): autoDetect mixed DPs from different zigbee devices
0.9.79.de: fix(light): autoDetect mixed DPs from different zigbee devices

0.9.77.en: fix(backup): create aura.0.backups meta namespace for file storage (beta)
0.9.77.de: fix(backup): create aura.0.backups meta namespace for file storage (beta)

0.9.75.en: fix(backup): store auto-backups as files instead of single state (beta)
0.9.75.de: fix(backup): store auto-backups as files instead of single state (beta)

0.9.73.en: chore(carousel): hide from widget pickers until production-ready (beta)
0.9.73.de: chore(carousel): hide from widget pickers until production-ready (beta)

0.9.72.en: fix(group-defs): block save until hydration completes — prevents data loss (beta)
0.9.72.de: fix(group-defs): block save until hydration completes — prevents data loss (beta)

0.9.71.en: feat(carousel): new widget type — swipeable slides hosting other widgets (beta)
0.9.71.de: feat(carousel): new widget type — swipeable slides hosting other widgets (beta)
